value: Riemann-von Mangoldt main term N0(T)=T/(2pi)log(T/(2pi))-T/(2pi)+7/8 with envelope N_lower <= N(T) <= N_upper.
Trudgian-style |S(T)| <= 0.112 log T + 0.278 log log T + 2.510, plus a +/-1 slack term.
Use base+offset arithmetic; displayed offsets are the trusted gap source.
The local window endpoints are known zeros included in G_local. The first tail bin on each side subtracts that known endpoint from the zero-count upper envelope to avoid double-counting local zeros.
G_local sums known zeros in the selected inclusive window and excludes the candidate pair endpoints. Tail bins cover only zeros outside that window.
Candidate gaps and local distances use Decimal/mpmath base+offset arithmetic; tiny gaps are never computed by subtracting huge float64 heights.
